# person-map.csv — Review Worklist (auto-generated 2026-07-22)

Generated by scanning all 740 rows for the parser-artifact patterns documented in `05-team-review-guide.md`. **This is an aid, not an authority** — every recommendation still needs your eyes. Heuristics over-fire (a name may look like a title; a duplicate cluster may be two different people who share a surname) and can miss cases that don't match a pattern.

Editable columns: `final_action`, `notes`, `reviewer`. Initials in `reviewer` on every row you touch. `final_action` overrides `needs_review`.

**⚠ `needs_review=0` rows are created as-is if left blank — the junk ones MUST be acted on.**

## 1. Field-swap — talk title in name, real speaker in `affiliation` (3)
*`merge:<speaker-key>` if the speaker has a clean row; else `drop` + note the speaker.*

- **L245** `italy-china-alliance-for-transaqua` — nr=0 occ=1  
  `Italy-China Alliance for Transaqua`  
  → **`drop`** + note: real speaker `Franco Persio Bocchetto, Foreign Director for Bonifica S.p.A, Italy` — no row (recover at presentation stage)
- **L246** `egypt-s-2030-mega-projects` — nr=0 occ=1  
  `Egypt's 2030 Mega Projects`  
  → **`drop`** + note: real speaker `Mrs. Moni Abdulla, Executive Manager of Pyramids International, Cairo` — no row (recover at presentation stage)
- **L247** `the-economic-method-of-larouche` — nr=0 occ=1  
  `The Economic Method of LaRouche`  
  → **`merge:jason-ross`** (speaker **Jason Ross** = clean row `Jason Ross`)
